name: Numerical reasoning from context
response:
The document states that Acme Robotics' revenue was $18.2M in 2023 and projected to reach $32M in 2024. To calculate the projected revenue growth percentage:

$$
\text{Growth Percentage} = \left( \frac{\text{Projected Revenue} - \text{Original Revenue}}{\text{Original Revenue}} \right) \times 100
$$

$$
= \left( \frac{32 - 18.2}{18.2} \right) \times 100
$$

$$
= \left( \frac{13.8}{18.2} \right) \times 100
$$

$$
= 76.37\%
$$

Therefore, the projected revenue growth from 2023 to 2024 is **76.37%*
